examples: Of the other Sibylline Books little need be said.
A young girl in the village found a sibylline book.
Even greater, though a different interest, attaches to the Sibylline Oracles, written in Greek hexameters.
And, as issue has followed issue, we have seen the price of security rise, in a steady Sibylline progress, until now it has reached the most awful height that a nation ever had to face.
